name: SendGrid
description: Email delivery and marketing platform for sending transactional and marketing email at scale.

auth_methods.note: Primary method is API Key (Bearer token). Docs also mention OAuth2 for integrations and legacy/basic SMTP username/password (deprecated) for SMTP; Web API uses Bearer API keys.

credential_access.note: SendGrid offers a free tier and docs show API keys can be created in the account UI, allowing developers to obtain working credentials without human approval.

api_surface.note: SendGrid provides a broad Web API (Web API v3) covering sending mail, marketing campaigns, contacts, etc., plus official SDKs for multiple languages listed in the docs.

buildability.note: Documentation is public and developers can self-create API keys on the free tier; therefore integration can be built today.

queries: SendGrid API documentation developer docs site:sendgrid.com "API" "docs" "sendgrid"
